name: Apex All-in-One Bot
description: Music + Admin + Economy + AntiPorn + ChatBot — All in one Telegram bot

API_ID.description: Telegram App ID — visit https://my.telegram.org then API Development Tools, copy the App api_id number

API_HASH.description: Telegram App Hash — visit https://my.telegram.org then API Development Tools, copy the App api_hash string

BOT_TOKEN.description: Bot Token — message @BotFather on Telegram, send /newbot and follow steps, copy the token

SESSION_STRING.description: Pyrogram session string for the assistant (second) account. Generate it by running SESSION_STRING_HELPER.py from this repo in any Python environment. Do NOT use your main account.

OWNER_ID.description: Your Telegram numeric user ID — message @userinfobot on Telegram to get it

OWNER_USERNAME.description: Your Telegram username WITHOUT the @ symbol

LOG_CHANNEL.description: Log channel ID (e.g. -1001234567890). Create a Telegram channel, add the bot as admin, get the ID via @userinfobot

MUST_JOIN.description: Channel username WITHOUT @ that users must join to use the bot (e.g. ApexAssociation). Leave empty to disable this check.

SUPPORT_CHAT.description: Support group invite link shown in /start message

YOUTUBE_COOKIES.description: YouTube cookies in Netscape format — optional, helps avoid age-restriction and bot-check errors. See cookies/README.txt in the repo.

VOLUME_BOOST.description: Audio volume multiplier from 1.0 to 10.0. Value 10.0 means maximum boost.
